q: The banking angle is ________ the radius of the circular path.
The centripetal force needed is ________ the angular velocity of the rotating body.
A ball attached to a string is whirled around a vertical circle. At the bottom of the arc,
a: it has a net force acting upward.
it has a net force acting downward.

q: The centripetal force needed is ________ the mass of the rotating body.
For the banked curve, the horizontal component of the normal force equals the ________.
The banking angle is ________ the mass of the car.
The centripetal force needed is ________ the radius of the circular path.
An object is in a uniform circular motion. Which of the following must be true?
a: The net force acting on the object is zero.
The velocity of the object is constant.
The speed of the object is constant.
The acceleration of the object is constant.

q: The banking angle is ________ the limiting speed.
For the banked curve, the vertical component of the normal force equals the ________.
The centripetal force needed is ________ the speed of the rotating body.
